option_metadata_t(3) Library Functions Manual option_metadata_t(3)

NAME

option_metadata_t - Metadata for shell completion generation.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/options/builder.h>

Data Fields


const char ** enum_values
Enum value strings (null-terminated, e.g., {auto",none,16,256,truecolor,NULL}). const char ** enum_descriptions
Descriptions parallel to enum_values (null-terminated, e.g., Auto-detectfromterminal"). const int * enum_integer_values
Actual enum integer values (e.g., {-1, 0, 1, 2, 3} for non-sequential enums). struct {
int min
Minimum value (or 0 if no limit). int max
Maximum value (or 0 if no limit). int step
Step size (0 = no step, continuous). } numeric_range
const char ** examples
Example values or command invocations (null-terminated array). const char * default_value
Default value as string for display. option_input_type_t input_type
What kind of input this option expects. bool is_list
If true, option accepts multiple comma-separated or space-separated values. const char * validation_pattern
Optional regex pattern for validation hints.

Detailed Description

Metadata for shell completion generation.

Stores additional information about options to enable smart shell completions with value suggestions, numeric ranges, examples, etc. This data is used by all shell completion generators (bash, fish, zsh, powershell).

Definition at line 192 of file builder.h.
